sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: Cloudflare 2025년 4분기 매출 34% 성장·연간 매출 30% 증가, AI 수요 확대 배경으로 신규 ACV 성장률 50%로 가속

keyPoints.text: 4분기 매출이 6억 1,450만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 34% 증가했습니다.
2025년 연간 매출은 21억 6,790만 달러로 전년 대비 30% 늘었습니다.
4분기 신규 연간계약금액(ACV) 성장률이 약 50%로, 2021년 이후 가장 빠른 증가세라고 경영진이 밝혔습니다.

businessChanges.text: AI와 에이전트가 인터넷을 재플랫폼화하며 Cloudflare 전 서비스에 걸쳐 수요를 촉진하고 있다고 경영진이 설명했습니다.
에이전트가 인터넷의 새로운 사용자가 된다면 Cloudflare는 에이전트가 실행되는 플랫폼이자 통과하는 네트워크가 된다는 성장 논리를 경영진이 제시했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 4분기 비GAAP 영업이익은 8,960만 달러(매출의 14.6%)로, 전년 동기 6,720만 달러(14.6%)에서 증가했습니다.
4분기 잉여현금흐름은 9,940만 달러(매출의 16.2%)로, 전년 동기 4,780만 달러(10.4%) 대비 크게 개선됐습니다.
4분기 영업현금흐름은 1억 9,040만 달러로 전년 동기 1억 2,730만 달러에서 증가했습니다.
현금·현금성 자산 및 매도가능증권은 2025년 말 기준 41억 130만 달러였습니다.

watchItems.text: AI 수요 전환이 실제 매출 성장으로 이어지고 있는지, 50% ACV 성장세가 이후 분기에도 지속될지 주목됩니다.
잉여현금흐름 마진이 16.2%로 개선된 추세가 유지될지, GAAP 영업손실 축소 속도가 관전 포인트입니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 q425exhibit991.htm EX-99.1 Document Cloudflare Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2025 Financial Results • Fourth quarter revenue totaled $614.5 million, representing an increase of 34% year-over-year; fiscal year 2025 revenue totaled $2,167.9 million, representing an increase of 30% year-over-year • GAAP loss from operations of $49.2 million, or 8% of total revenue, and non-GAAP income from operations of $89.6 million, or 15% of total revenue • Delivered RPO year-over-year growth of 48% and Current RPO year-over-year growth of 34% San Francisco, CA, February 10, 2026 — Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET), the leading connectivity cloud company, today announced financial results for its  Normalized numeric aliases: $614.5 million = 6억 1,450만 달러; $2,167.9 million = 21억 6,790만 달러; $49.2 million = 4,920만 달러; $89.6 million = 8,960만 달러; $42.5 million = 4,250만 달러; $614.5 = 614.5달러; $2,167.9 = 2,167.9달러; $49.2 = 49.2달러; $42.5 = 42.5달러; $89.6 = 89.6달러; 2,167 million = 21억 6,700만 달러.

total new ACV grew nearly 50 percent year-over-year, our fastest growth rate since 2021," said Matthew Prince, co-founder & CEO, Cloudflare. "The shift toward AI and agents represents a fundamental re-platforming of the Internet that's driving demand across Cloudflare's services. If agents are the new users of the web, Cloudflare is the platform they run on and the network they pass through. This creates a virtuous flywheel: more agents drive more code to Cloudflare Workers, which fuels demand for our performance, security, and networking services. We were built for this moment and the rise of the Agentic Internet." Fourth Quarter 2025 Financial Highlights • Revenue : Total revenue of $614.5 million representing an increase of 33.6% year-over-year. • Gross Profit : GAAP gross profit was $452.6  Normalized numeric aliases: $614.5 million = 6억 1,450만 달러; $452.6 million = 4억 5,260만 달러; $351.3 million = 3억 5,130만 달러; $614.5 = 614.5달러; $452.6 = 452.6달러; $351.3 = 351.3달러; 50 percent = 50%.

of 2024. Non-GAAP gross profit was $460.2 million, or 74.9% gross margin, compared to $356.8 million, or 77.6%, in the fourth quarter of 2024. • Operating Income (Loss) : GAAP loss from operations was $49.2 million, or 8.0% of total revenue, compared to $34.7 million, or 7.5% of total revenue, in the fourth quarter of 2024. Non-GAAP income from operations was $89.6 million, or 14.6% of total revenue, compared to $67.2 million, or 14.6% of total revenue, in the fourth quarter of 2024. • Net Income (Loss) : GAAP net loss was $12.1 million, compared to $12.8 million in the fourth quarter of 2024. GAAP  Normalized numeric aliases: $460.2 million = 4억 6,020만 달러; $356.8 million = 3억 5,680만 달러; $49.2 million = 4,920만 달러; $34.7 million = 3,470만 달러; $89.6 million = 8,960만 달러; $67.2 million = 6,720만 달러; $12.1 million = 1,210만 달러; $12.8 million = 1,280만 달러; $68.8 million = 6,880만 달러; $89.6 = 89.6달러; $0.04 = 0.04달러; $0.03 = 0.03달러; $106.8 = 106.8달러; $68.8 = 68.8달러; $0.28 = 0.28달러; $0.19 = 0.19달러.

Cash Flow : Net cash flow from operating activities was $190.4 million, compared to $127.3 million for the fourth quarter of 2024. Free cash flow was $99.4 million, or 16.2% of total revenue, compared to $47.8 million, or 10.4% of total revenue, in the fourth quarter of 2024. • Cash, cash equivalents, and available-for-sale securities were $4,101.3 million as of December 31, 2025. Full Year 2025 Financial Highlights • Revenue : Total revenue of $2,167.9 million  Normalized numeric aliases: $190.4 million = 1억 9,040만 달러; $127.3 million = 1억 2,730만 달러; $99.4 million = 9,940만 달러; $47.8 million = 4,780만 달러; $4,101.3 million = 41억 130만 달러; $2,167.9 million = 21억 6,790만 달러; $1,615.4 million = 16억 1,540만 달러; $1,290.9 million = 12억 9,090만 달러; $1,313.6 million = 13억 1,360만 달러; $47.8 = 47.8달러; $1,643.2 = 1,643.2달러; 2,167 million = 21억 6,700만 달러; 4,101 million = 41억 100만 달러; 1,615 million = 16억 1,500만 달러; 1,290 million = 12억 9,000만 달러; 1,643 million = 16억 4,300만 달러; 1,313 million = 13억 1,300만 달러.
